<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * phpDocumentor * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection; /** * Interface for project. Since the definition of a project can be different per factory this interface will be small. */ interface Project { /** * Returns the name of the project. */ public function getName() : string; }
